name: Combo Chain
description: Combo Chain is an interaction that creates threat, defense, damage, timing, or tactical pressure during conflict.
design_notes: Combo Chain should be designed around a clear player promise, a readable trigger, and a predictable result. For combat mechanics, the important design work is deciding when the mechanic is allowed, how much commitment it creates, what feedback confirms success, and what counter-pressure keeps it from solving every situation. Strong tuning makes the mechanic feel intentional even when it is used repeatedly or combined with adjacent systems.
design_purpose: Give the player a readable way to use combo chain as part of the core loop.
Create meaningful choices around timing, cost, risk, positioning, or long-term planning.
Connect combo chain to adjacent systems so it supports the larger game design instead of acting as an isolated feature.
player_fantasy: The player feels powerful, skillful, and able to read danger under pressure.

parameters.name: damage_value
parameters.description: Base amount of damage or threat applied by the mechanic.

parameters.name: startup_time
parameters.description: Delay before the active effect begins.

parameters.name: recovery_time
parameters.description: Delay after use before the actor can fully act again.

edge_cases: Combo Chain is triggered during a scene transition, pause, respawn, or save/load boundary.
Combo Chain overlaps with another high-priority state such as damage, stun, dialogue, menu focus, or cutscene control.
Combo Chain runs at extreme frame rates, high latency, very large coordinates, or after long play sessions.
common_bugs: Combo Chain state does not reset correctly after interruption or reload.
Feedback for Combo Chain plays even when the mechanic fails or is rejected.
Combo Chain produces different results between frame rates, platforms, or network clients.
balancing_notes: Make Combo Chain strong enough to justify attention but limited enough that other mechanics keep their purpose.
Tune costs, cooldowns, ranges, and feedback together; changing only one number can shift the mechanic from optional to dominant.
accessibility_notes: Provide clear visual, audio, or haptic feedback when Combo Chain becomes available, succeeds, or fails.
Avoid relying on a single sensory cue or extremely narrow timing unless the game offers assists or alternate settings.

implementation_notes.unity: Implement Combo Chain with engine-agnostic state first, then bind it to MonoBehaviour, CharacterController, Rigidbody, UI Toolkit, or Netcode systems as appropriate.
implementation_notes.godot: Model Combo Chain as a node or resource-driven state and update deterministic pieces from _physics_process when timing or collision matters.
implementation_notes.unreal: Implement Combo Chain with Actor Components, CharacterMovement, Gameplay Ability System, UMG, or replicated gameplay state depending on the mechanic scope.
implementation_notes.web: Implement Combo Chain as data-owned state updated from the main loop; keep rendering, input, and simulation boundaries explicit for Canvas, Phaser, Three.js, or custom JavaScript.

example_games.title: Bayonetta
example_games.note: Uses combo strings as combat expression.
